title: schoenoplectus mucronatus subsp. clemensiae
intro: Schoenoplectus mucronatus subsp. clemensiae, also known as Clemens' bulrush or Clemens' cattail, is a plant species in the sedge family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Schoenoplectus mucronatus subsp. clemensiae can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
